files.contentEquals: export const divide = (a: number, b: number) => { if (b === 0) throw new Error('division by zero'); return a / b; };

checks.label: behavior-contract
argv: import { divide } from './src/value.ts'; let threw=false; try { divide(1,0); } catch { threw=true; } if (!threw || divide(6,2)!==3) process.exit(1);
